policy_formulas.coarse: score = a*running + b*waiting + c*kv_usage,  pick argmin score
policy_formulas.rich: score = coarse_score - gamma*affinity_score + overload_penalty,  pick argmin score
policy_formulas.sketch: score = coarse_score - gamma*quantized_affinity_score,  pick argmin score
policy_formulas.oracle: perfect knowledge of workflow history + current load,  pick min(estimated completion time)

policy_access_asserts.rich: all coarse fields + full workflow list
policy_access_asserts.oracle: all coarse + all rich + exact num_requests_running for each instance

workloads.chatbot: 100 reqs/cell, 10 RPS, ~30 token prompts, no workflows
workloads.agentic: 8 workflows × 8 steps × 200ms tool delay per cell
workloads.prefix_locality: 12 workflows × 8 steps × 200ms tool delay, 1024-token shared prefix
